creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

Unfortunately, nvidia-driver port is a bit special (it employs certain magic 
to allow xorg-server and libGL to coexist with it being installed at a cost 
of breaking pkgdb), which pkgng does not tolerate.  See this thread for some 
details: http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?20120606131623.GA82148 

It is currently being discussed what's the best way to solve the problem.
